name: pixelhub
description: Gather.town-style 2D virtual space with proximity chat

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pixelhub/shared build && pnpm --filter @pixelhub/server build && pnpm --filter @pixelhub/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pixelhub/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @pixelhub/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @pixelhub/client typecheck
